commands.name: add-module
commands.description: Add a multi-package module to a solution by finding all packages of the module, finding related projects in the solution and adding each package to the corresponding project in the solution.

commands.name: add-package
commands.description: Add a new ABP package to a project by adding related NuGet package dependencies and [DependsOn(...)] attributes.

commands.name: build
commands.description: Builds a dotnet repository and dependent repositories or a solution.

commands.name: bundle
commands.description: Bundles all third party styles and scripts required by modules and updates index.html file.

commands.name: clean
commands.description: Delete all BIN and OBJ folders in current folder.

commands.name: clear-download-cache
commands.description: Clears the templates download cache.

commands.name: cli
commands.description: Update or remove ABP CLI. See https://abp.io/docs/latest/cli

commands.name: generate-proxy
commands.description: Generates client service proxies and DTOs to consume HTTP APIs.

commands.name: get-source
commands.description: Download the source code of the specified module.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show command line help. Write ` abp help <command> `

commands.name: install-libs
commands.description: Install NPM Packages for MVC / Razor Pages and Blazor Server UI types.

commands.name: list-modules
commands.description: List open source application modules

commands.name: list-templates
commands.description: Lists available templates to be created.

commands.name: login
commands.description: Sign in to https://account.abp.io/.

commands.name: login-info
commands.description: Show your login info.

commands.name: logout
commands.description: Sign out from https://account.abp.io/.

commands.name: mcp
commands.description: Runs the local MCP server and outputs client configuration for AI tool integration.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Generate a new solution based on the ABP startup templates.

commands.name: prompt
commands.description: Starts with prompt mode.

commands.name: remove-proxy
commands.description: Remove client service proxies and DTOs to consume HTTP APIs.

commands.name: suite
commands.description: Install, update, remove or start ABP Suite. See https://abp.io/suite.

commands.name: switch-to-local
commands.description: Changes all NuGet package references to local project references for all the .csproj files in the specified folder (and all its subfolders with any deep)

commands.name: switch-to-nightly
commands.description: Switches packages to nightly preview ABP version.

commands.name: switch-to-prerc
commands.description: Switches npm packages to pre-rc ABP version.

commands.name: switch-to-preview
commands.description: Switches packages to preview ABP version.

commands.name: switch-to-stable
commands.description: Switches packages to stable ABP version from preview version.

commands.name: translate
commands.description: Mainly used to translate ABP's resources (JSON files) easier.

commands.name: update
commands.description:
Update all ABP related NuGet packages and NPM packages in a solution or project to the latest version.
To get a detailed help for a command:
abp help <command>
See the documentation for more info: https://abp.io/docs/latest/cli
